MINI MINUTES: This matter came on calendar this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing as to defendant Amoreena O. Brannum
Judge: Gail Dekreon. Clerk: R. Sahatjian. Reporter: Giselle Casey, CSR #8098. Telephone: 415-717-9768. Email: casey.giselle@gmail.com.
Scott Righthand, Esq. and Britney Roger, Esq, appearing for Plaintiff Lilliana Mae Braico present in court. No appearance by defendant Amoreena O. Brannum. Petitioner sworn and examined.
After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of plaintiff Lilliana Mae Braico, and against the defaulted defendant Amoreena O. Brannum, as follows:

Total - $5,000,000.00

Proposed Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.
